summary: The discv5 filter divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in FilterOutcome::Ignore returns; no ENR fork filtering behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 124: M	crates/net/discv5/src/filter.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons after `FilterOutcome::Ignore { reason: ... }` return expressions.
No required-key check, forbidden-key iteration, reason formatting, or filter outcome behavior changed.
